name: Hand Ice Mold & Dragons Blood Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the hand, fill a new rubber glove with water.
2. Tie at the wrist with string and freeze for one or two days until firm.
3. Unmold the ice by gently tapping on the bottom of the glove to release it from the freezer tray. Occasionally, a finger may fall off during unmolding, which adds to the eerie effect.
4. To create a base for the hand, fill a 1-pound coffee can about one-third full with water.
5. Insert the frozen hand into the coffee can and freeze until firm.
6. To make the punch, mix equal parts of apple juice and cranberry juice with ginger ale.
7. Refrigerate the mixture.
8. When ready to serve, place half the punch in the punch bowl.
9. Insert the hand ice mold in the center of the punch bowl.
10. Fill the bowl with the remaining punch.
11. For added effect, sprinkle a few drops of red food coloring on the tips of the fingers just before serving.
